title: HoloMap Basics
summary: Review routes, markers, and terrain before you move.
body: The ECHO HoloMap shows your current position, discovered routes, and key markers.
Use it to plan expeditions and avoid hazards.
Routes update as you discover new signal leads and mission waypoints.
steps: Plan your path before leaving shelter.
commonMistakes: Traveling blind without checking the map.
Missing route updates after signal discoveries.
